name: 14q24_BMP4_paralog_module
description: BMP4 region at 14q22.2 (just proximal of 14q24) and the wider 14q24 interval contains BMP-family paralog modules and ESR2 region SDs. Small (~5-20 kb at 92-96% identity) directly-oriented SDs flank ESR2 and PSEN1 contributing to rare intragenic NAHR events.

architecture.internal_structure: 5-20 kb SD pairs at 92-96% identity scattered around ESR2 and PSEN1; BMP4 paralog footprint (4 kb) distal.
